case_title: CCSF, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION vs. WONG, JOHN KIM HONE et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-23-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 8/23/96: FOR EFFECTING TRANSFER.
